race.comment: Looks a good race for BEE EXACT (6) who ran very well here last time. Sat close and stuck on very well despite a lot of pressure, finishing a close-up fourth. Drawn for a perfect trail off a hot pace and should be in the finish. PERRI LASS (8) will appreciate a few of these out wide pressing on. Found the line nicely last time when a close-up fourth and should be winding up late. SILVER SPOON (2) is back in grade and looks well placed. Aided by the scratchings with some of the sting coming out of the pace.  YES I'M UGLY (3) was well off best up north last time. Winning rider back aboard and can do much better.
